name: attention-research
description: Scheduled intelligence research pipeline for OpenClaw — twice-daily signal-first research with topic-level freshness state
author: river

changes: First public OSS cut — twice-daily signal research pipeline
CORE + TOPICS layered prompt structure (generic base + domain-specific)
6 pre-built topic prompts: us-iran-conflict, ai, geopolitics, finance-markets, climate-changes, bio-tech
Onboarding with requirements check and entity/signal defaults
META.json freshness contract with retry logic
Domain-agnostic digest format and signal rules
Thin skill — web search is delegated to the invoking agent
